title: CC narrative review S14 panel a1

payload.notes:
S14 is the mechanical heart of beat B08 (通胀审计·全片高潮 — the inflated +6.2 collapses to a raw +1.4, with +4.8 attributed to the evaluator's JSON sanitizer self-repair). In the S12→S15 arc it owns the literal collapse moment (S12 sets up the inflated headline, S13 diagnoses the sanitizer leak, S14 re-scores honestly with raw json.loads and the gap collapses, S15 enforces the re-run). STORY-only judgment.

BEAT FIDELITY 5/5 — The panel nails the climax beat. The baked 'HONEST RE-EVAL' header plus the visible 'the gap collapses' / 're-score with raw json.loads + jsonschema' content lands the exact mechanical claim of the audit: the headline number was inflated by the sanitizer's silent self-repair, and an honest re-evaluation with un-sanitized parsing crashes the score back to its raw value. The two figures (executor + reviewer) are positioned around the collapsing-gap visualization so the 'we caught our own inflation' meaning is unambiguous; this is the payoff the whole rollback arc was building toward.

COMPOSITION (STORY) 4/5 — Reading order flows header -> collapsing gap -> the raw-parse fix cleanly, and the cell stays distinct from S12 (inflated entry), S13 (diagnosis) and S15 (RE-RUN ENFORCED). One story risk only: the baked-text region is dense enough that the dramatic 'collapse' motion competes slightly with the explanatory parse line for the eye. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers.
